SELECT value, trunc(value) FROM numbers WHERE value > 5;
SELECT value, trunc(value) FROM numbers ORDER BY value DESC;
SELECT AVG(trunc(value)) AS avg_truncated FROM numbers;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT trunc(value) AS truncated_value FROM numbers) AS subquery WHERE truncated_value > 10;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT a.value, trunc(a.value) AS truncated_a, b.value, trunc(b.value) AS truncated_b FROM numbers a JOIN more_numbers b ON trunc(a.value) = trunc(b.value);
SELECT trunc(SUM(value)) AS total_truncated FROM (SELECT value FROM numbers UNION SELECT value FROM more_numbers);
SELECT DISTINCT trunc(value) FROM numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(trunc(value)) FROM (SELECT * FROM numbers WHERE value < 50) AS subquery;
SELECT MIN(trunc(value)) AS min_truncation FROM numbers WHERE value > -2;
